overrides: Use dark-neon game UI visual direction instead of the default light SUN.STUDIO look while retaining SUN.STUDIO resources and local fonts.

limitations: No real Unity 3D model asset was provided; cover uses local Unity/gamepad iconography and CSS isometric geometry.
This run targets HTML only. PPTX/PDF can be generated in a later run with documented renderer limitations.
v3 is a creative Neon Game HUD redesign based on v2 and preserves the same source intent within an 8-slide structure.
Slides 2, 4, 6, and 7 received an additional polish pass for connector alignment, layout balance, UI cohesion, and visual hierarchy.

Latest draft pass removes visible XP/mission language, fixes slide progress placement, improves body/footer spacing, expands and raises the cover cube stack, adds stronger cube-face glow, simplifies slide 1 hero copy, aligns slide 2 unlock-card styling with final unlock, adds slide 5 launch-number glow, polishes slide 6 support cards, spaces slide 7 readiness meter content, polishes slide 4 back into a balanced pipeline/console layout, and updates slide 8 DIO to the soft Spotlight Stage background.
Export fallback used because gen_pptx is unavailable: PDF is generated from HTML render captures; PPTX is a hybrid editable file with native text overlays on rendered backgrounds.
The PDF is the visual-authority artifact. The PPTX prioritizes visual parity for complex CSS effects while keeping primary slide text editable as native PowerPoint text.
Three small support-role chips on slide 6 remain embedded in the PPTX background to preserve visual parity.
